details.test: Task 1: Book highest-rated beginner morning workshop under $60 for 1 person
Task 2: Schedule two workshops with at least 2-hour gap between them
Task 3: Book workshop for 2 adults and 1 child using family-style participant fields
Task 4: Purchase 3-session beginner bundle under $120 with materials included
Task 5: Book prerequisite workshop then advanced-like workshop with prerequisite link enforced
Task 6: Buy two gift vouchers ($50 printable, $80 email) and proceed to checkout
Task 7: Book cheapest 3-hour evening Downtown Studio workshop for 3 people with pay-at-studio
Task 8: Build retreat by booking two workshops with combined price between $100 and $180
Task 9: Book weekday morning next week with EARLY10 promo and saved credit card
